channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-22
item.description:
The open-source research community has seen significant progress across multiple projects. Notably, the `statcheck` and `escicheck` projects have made updates to their main branches, with `escicheck` syncing with the latest versions of `effectcheck`. Meanwhile, `docpluck` has addressed several issues, including text loss and rendering fixes, while `regcheck` has updated its demo page, fixed bugs, and renamed survey routes to avoid ad blocker interference. The `coarse` project has re-enabled Fable 5 in the model picker, and `oddpub` has updated its ontogenerator with a code validation update. These connections between projects, such as the syncing of `escicheck` with `effectcheck`, highlight the collaborative nature of the community and celebrate the progress being made towards improving research tools.

21 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

oddpub8 commits
tenzing7 commits
metacheck5 commits
escicheck1 commits

item.title: escicheck: 1 commit today
item.description:
giladfeldman/escicheck

The `main` branch was updated with a sync from `escicheckapp@7c4eb22`, which corresponds to `effectcheck v0.6.14`. The `main` branch was also previously updated with a sync from `escicheckapp@ec9eb9f`, which corresponds to `effectcheck v0.6.13`. These commits suggest that the repository is being kept in sync with another project, `escicheckapp`, with the latest versions of `effectcheck` being reflected in the `main` branch. The specific changes brought in by these syncs are not detailed in the commit messages, but they are associated with issues `#27` and `#26`, respectively. No other branches were worked on in these commits, with all changes being applied to the `main` branch.

1 commit(s) today:

  • e7b7351 [main] sync from escicheckapp@7c4eb22 (effectcheck v0.6.14) (#27) — Gilad Feldman

View all commits →
